author: IGN YouTube
text:
Game of the Year Watch 2026 Begins
Welcome to a special edition of Game of the Year Watch. This is our show where we start lining up potential Game of the Year candidates to see what we’ll likely be voting on come awards season. No matter where you play, there have been a lot of great games released this year already. From Resident Evil to Pokemon to Forza to Crimson Desert to 007… Just an embarrassment of riches for us gamers. I’ve polled the IGN audience to see if there are any frontrunners for the fans. Let’s look at the best-reviewed games of 2026 so far. 

#IGN #Gaming #GOTYwatch

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Steam Machine - Official Overview and Quick Start Guide
Take a look at the Overview and Quick Start Guide for Steam Machine, a gaming-focused PC developed by Valve. Users can get the rundown on the features the new hardware has to offer, alongside how to set the device up to get to gaming as soon as possible. The Steam Machine begins to ship on June 29.

#IGN #GAMING

author: IGN YouTube
text:
GTA 6 $100 Pre-Order: Worth It? | GTFM
With the pricing finally confirmed for GTA 6 at $79.99 for the standard edition, $99.99 for the ultimate edition, and with no sign of GTA Online releasing any time soon, the question has to be asked, at $100 is the pre-order price worth it? On this episode of GTFM, Brian, Max, and Ryan break down the pros and cons of this premium pricing model, the physical edition of the game not featuring a disc, how much storage the game might end up taking, and if we'll see any GTA 6 or GTA Online gameplay any time soon.

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Marvel Rivals - Official 'Aquatic Assassin' Black Widow Costume Trailer
Take a look at the 'Aquatic Assassin' Black Widow Costume Trailer for Marvel Rivals, a third-person team-shooter action game developed by NetEase Games. Players can check out the beach-ready skin for Black Widow, who's ready to strike from the shadows of the coast. Attain the 'Aquatic Assassin' Black Widow Costume on June 25 for Marvel Rivals on PlayStation 4 (PS4), PlayStation 5 (PS5), Xbox Series X|S, and PC (Steam).

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Call of Duty: Black Ops 7 Season 4 Reloaded  - Official Multiplayer Maps Trailer
Take a look at the Season 4 Reloaded Multiplayer Maps Trailer for Call of Duty: Black Ops 7, the latest addition to the first-person action shooter franchise developed by Treyarch. Players can get a look at the new maps coming with Season 4 Reloaded, including the brand-new map Zenith and the return of the classic Black Ops 1 map Launch. Season 4 Reloaded for Call of Duty: Black Ops 7 launches on June 25 for PlayStation 4 (PS4), PlayStation 5 (PS5), Xbox One, Xbox Series X|S, and PC (Steam).

#IGN #Gaming

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Marvel Tokon: Fighting Souls - Official Ms. Marvel Character Guide Trailer
Check out the Ms. Marvel Character Guide Trailer for Marvel Tokon: Fighting Souls, the upcoming action fighting game developed by ARC System Works. Players can get a look at Ms. Marvel's moveset, taking advantage of her stretchy limbs, fast-paced attacks, and amazing mix-ups. Fight as Ms. Marvel in Marvel Tokon: Fighting Souls, launching on August 6 for PlayStation 5 (PS5) and PC (Steam and Epic Games Store).

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Deadites, Necronomicon and Lore Explained - Evil Dead Burn and Survival Rules
What happens when the people you trust most are weaponized against you? In this breakdown of Evil Dead Burn, we examine the core mechanics of the film's threats, focusing on the psychological nature of the Deadites and the lore behind the Necronomicon.

Evil Dead Burn hits theaters July 10, 2026.

Evil Dead Burn stars Souheila Yacoub, Tandi Wright, Hunter Doohan, Luciane Buchanan, Erroll Shand, Maude Davey, George Pullar, and Greta Van Den Brink; it is directed by Sébastien Vaniček.

Sponsored by Warner Bros.

#IGN

text:
CLUTCH Early Gameplay Livestream with Maverick Games
Join key members of the CLUTCH development team, Creative Director Mike Brown, Art Director Ben Penrose and Content Curator Andrew Baranowski, for a live look at early gameplay and a Q&A as they answer players' biggest questions following the game's reveal at Summer Game Fest.

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Capcom Spotlight｜June 2026
The Capcom Spotlight is a digital event that brings you the latest news from Capcom! In the upcoming show, they'll be covering updates to games that are out now, plus new info on upcoming titles. Some featured games include Monster Hunter Stories 3: Twisted Reflection, Onimusha: Way of the Sword, and Dragon's Dogma 2: Dark Arisen. The broadcast is planned to be approximately 30 minutes and begins at June 25 at 2pm PT.

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Supergirl Review
After a memorable crash landing in last year's Superman, Milly Alcock is back as Kara Zor-El in Supergirl, her first solo adventure in the James Gunn DCU. Directed by Craig Gillespie, this hard-drinking version of Woman of Tomorrow is a grab bag of influences from True Grit, Mad Max, Guardians of the Galaxy and, as any self-respecting film with practical makeup effects for a menagerie of alien extras should be, Star Wars. While Alcock is great and Jason Momoa as Lobo is as fun as we thought he'd be, the movie might actually take a little too literally from these influences. IGN's Clint Gage reviews Supergirl and talks about superhero alter egos, flashbacks vs chronological order and why the future is bright for Kryptonians on the big screen.
